author: andreypz
body:
#### PR description:

A simple PR to enable the worflows to run with CMSSW_16_X (fixing minor ROOT issues)

#### PR validation:

Validated manually by running the jobs.
The full documentation is available on [this twiki](https://twiki.cern.ch/twiki/bin/view/CMS/DTCalibrationTools)
title: Update of DT ttrig calibration workflows for 16_X (fix ROOT issues)
